# TapCrop — Free Online Batch Image Processing Tool

> TapCrop is a free, privacy-first online tool for batch image processing. It runs 100% in the browser — no images are ever uploaded to a server. No signup required.

## What TapCrop Does

TapCrop lets you crop, resize, compress, watermark, and convert images in bulk. Upload hundreds of photos, apply settings, and download them all in one click.

## Core Features

- **Batch Crop**: Crop hundreds of images to the same dimensions with custom focal points. 50+ presets for Instagram, YouTube, Facebook, Twitter, Etsy, ID photos, and more.
- **Batch Resize**: Resize images to exact pixel dimensions with high-quality resampling and locked aspect ratios.
- **Image Compression**: Reduce file size by up to 90% without visible quality loss. Adjustable quality slider.
- **Watermark**: Add custom text watermarks with configurable font size, color, opacity, and position.
- **Format Conversion**: Convert between JPG, PNG, WebP, and HEIC formats.
- **HEIC to JPG**: Automatically convert iPhone HEIC photos to universally compatible JPG.

## Key Facts

- 100% browser-based processing — images never leave your device
- No signup or account required
- Free plan: 100 images per day, all core features, no watermarks
- Pro plan available for unlimited usage
- Bilingual: English and Chinese (中文)
- Works on desktop and mobile browsers
- Works offline after initial page load
- Supports JPG, PNG, WebP, BMP, TIFF, GIF, HEIC/HEIF formats

## URLs

- Homepage: https://www.tapcrop.com
- App: https://www.tapcrop.com/app
- Crop Tool: https://www.tapcrop.com/crop
- Resize Tool: https://www.tapcrop.com/resize
- Compress Tool: https://www.tapcrop.com/compress
- Watermark Tool: https://www.tapcrop.com/watermark
- Convert Tool: https://www.tapcrop.com/convert
- HEIC to JPG: https://www.tapcrop.com/heic-to-jpg
- WebP to PNG: https://www.tapcrop.com/webp-to-png
- Resize JPG: https://www.tapcrop.com/resize-jpg
- Resize PNG: https://www.tapcrop.com/resize-png
- Compress JPG: https://www.tapcrop.com/compress-jpg

## Guides

- Instagram Image Size Guide: https://www.tapcrop.com/guides/instagram
- YouTube Thumbnail Guide: https://www.tapcrop.com/guides/youtube
- Twitter Image Size Guide: https://www.tapcrop.com/guides/twitter
- Batch Cropping Guide: https://www.tapcrop.com/guides/batch-crop

## How It Works

1. Upload images (drag & drop or file picker). Supports JPG, PNG, WebP, HEIC.
2. Choose settings: pick a preset or enter custom dimensions. Set focal points.
3. Click Process. Download individually or as a ZIP file.

## Pricing

- Free: 100 images/day, all core tools, no watermarks
- Pro: Unlimited images, advanced features (brightness/contrast/saturation adjustment, custom watermark positions)
